title: BEM-840 request Claude agreement
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/autonomy','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:01 (UTC+3)'
request=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem840_protocol_agreement_request.md')
request.write_text('# BEM-840 | REQUEST TO CLAUDE INTERNAL AUDITOR | PROTOCOL AGREEMENT'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor, please review and agree the multi-agent development protocol for ai-devops-system.'+sep+sep+'Context: operator requires a coordinated protocol between GPT external auditor and Claude internal auditor. Previous attempts did not produce a real Claude mailbox response. Do not use operator as relay.'+sep+sep+'Required output: write a real response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem840_claude_protocol_agreement_response.md'+sep+sep+'Required sections:'+sep+'1. Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED'+sep+'2. Agreed protocol table: Agent, Responsibility, Trigger, Evidence, Failure handling'+sep+'3. Architecture view: mailbox, watchdog/timer, dispatch queue, runtime state, Telegram notifications'+sep+'4. Minimum smoke proofs for auditor communication'+sep+'5. If BLOCKED, exact blocker and exact file/workflow to repair'+sep+sep+'No issue comments.'+sep)
# Activate watchdog/timer state for Claude mailbox monitoring.
watch=Path('governance/autonomy/claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.json')
watch.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.v2','active':True,'reason':'BEM-840 protocol agreement request sent to Claude; monitor until real Claude response appears','interval_minutes':1,'started_at':created,'operator_role':'none','target_response':'governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem840_claude_protocol_agreement_response.md'},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state=Path('governance/state/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_state.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_state.v2','status':'active_waiting_for_bem840_claude_response','checked_at':created,'interval_minutes':1,'checks':[{'time':created,'status':'request_written','target':'governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem840_claude_protocol_agreement_response.md'}],'operator_role':'none'},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
# Queue Claude dispatcher retry through existing workflow dispatch queue.
queue=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_claude_protocol_agreement_dispatch.json')
queue.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 dispatch Claude internal auditor for protocol agreement request','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem840_request_protocol_agreement_claude.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-840 | Request Protocol Agreement From Claude | DISPATCH_QUEUED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Request: '+str(request)+sep+'Watchdog: active interval 1 minute'+sep+'Queue: '+str(queue)+sep+'Blocker: waiting for real Claude response'+sep)
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next_monitor_claude_response.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-840 Next | Monitor Claude protocol response'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Next: run minute-style mailbox checks until real Claude response appears; do not accept blocker/fallback files as Claude response.'+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840 CLAUDE PROTOCOL AGREEMENT'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Claude request written and dispatcher queued. Next: monitor mailbox and dispatch/runtime triad until real response.'+sep+'Operator relay: forbidden.'+sep)
out={'bem':'BEM-840','status':'claude_protocol_request_written_dispatch_queued_watchdog_active','request':str(request),'watchdog_active':str(watch),'queue':str(queue),'target_response':'governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem840_claude_protocol_agreement_response.md','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_request_protocol_agreement_claude.json').write_text(json.dumps(out,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(out,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(request),str(watch),str(state),str(queue),str(report),str(pending),str(handoff),'governance/state/bem840_request_protocol_agreement_claude.json','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Sent BEM-840 protocol agreement request to Claude mailbox, activated one-minute watchdog state, and queued Claude dispatcher workflow dispatch')
"""
No issue comments.
